232:3758.name: 3% is based on the rate of the freelancer that is submitted. An example: For a freelancer at a rate of € 100 per hour, Staff-IT gets 8% commission, and shares with you 3%. You earn up to € 528 per month (€ 800 * 3% * 22 days ) or € 6 336 per year.
